title: Prevent order access without a valid session
description: An unauthenticated user cannot view or create orders and is blocked from protected order access.

steps.description: Navigate to the order management page
Verify protected order access is blocked
Verify order data is not displayed

title: Sign in and access protected operational data
description: This verifies that an authorized user can sign in and view protected orders, tables, and products needed for daily restaurant operation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the link to the POS view
Verify orders data is displayed
Verify table status data is displayed
Verify product catalog data is displayed

title: Create a new order from POS
description: A waiter can create a new order with a table, waiter, and items and see it reflected in the order list.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the order management page
Start creating a new order
Select a table for the order
Select a waiter for the order
Add one or more menu items to the order
Submit the new order
Verify the created order is displayed in the order list
Verify the order can proceed through the payment workflow

title: Sign out and block access to products
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can log out and then no longer access protected product data.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the sign-out control
Click the link to the products view
Verify access is blocked
Verify product data is not displayed

title: Reject invalid sign in attempts
description: This verifies that invalid credentials are rejected and access to protected areas is denied.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid-user@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the form
Verify an authentication error is visible
Verify protected operational data is not displayed

title: Create a new order from the table map
description: A waiter can use the tables view to pick an available table and assign it to a new order.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the tables view
Open the order creation flow from the selected table
Select a waiter for the order
Add one or more menu items to the order
Submit the new order
Verify the order is created from the selected table
Verify the table remains consistently assigned to the new order

title: Show tables access is blocked without a session
description: This verifies that opening the tables view without signing in does not reveal protected table data.

steps.description: Navigate to /tables
Verify access is blocked
Verify table status data is not displayed

title: Take a new order and see it in the active orders list
description: This verifies that an authorized user can create a new POS order with table, server, and products and then find it in the active orders list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the link to the POS order view
Open the new order form
Select a valid table
Select a valid server
Add at least one valid product to the order
Submit the form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the new order appears in the active orders list

title: View active and historical orders
description: A cashier can open the order management view and see existing active and historical orders for review.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the order management page
Verify orders are displayed
Verify both active and historical order information is available

title: View table statuses for service assignment
description: This verifies that an authorized user can open the tables view and see the current table states needed to assign a table to an order.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the link to the tables view
Verify table status data is displayed
Verify multiple table states are shown

title: List products for daily operations
description: This verifies that an authorized user can open the products view and see the current catalog for management and POS use.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the link to the products view
Verify product catalog data is displayed
Verify the catalog is not empty

title: Create a product and see it in the catalog
description: This verifies that a user with permission can create a new menu product and confirm it appears in the product list afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the link to the products view
Open the new product form
Fill in the product name with a unique valid name
Fill in the remaining required product fields with valid values
Submit the form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the new product appears in the catalog

title: Refresh orders after creation
description: After creating an order, the updated order appears in subsequent order listings without leaving the management flow.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the order management page
Create a new valid order
Refresh the order list within the page
Verify the newly created order is still displayed
Verify the order list reflects the latest data

title: Block order creation when required information is missing
description: This verifies that an order cannot be created until the required table, server, and product information is provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the link to the POS order view
Open the new order form
Submit the form
Verify an order validation error is visible
Verify no new order is created

title: Block order creation with invalid data
description: A user cannot create an order with missing required information and the form shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the order management page
Start creating a new order
Submit the new order without completing the required fields
Verify order validation errors are visible
Verify no new order is added to the list

title: Show validation errors for incomplete product creation
description: This verifies that submitting an incomplete product form is prevented and the catalog is not changed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the link to the products view
Open the new product form
Submit the form
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the catalog remains unchanged

title: View inventory items list and verify stock levels
description: This verifies that an authorized user can log in, navigate to the inventory page, view the list of ingredients, and see any low stock warnings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the link to the inventory view
Verify the inventory page is displayed with ingredients listed
Verify stock warning indicators are displayed if items are below minimum

title: Register manual adjustment of inventory stock
description: This verifies that an authorized user can adjust the stock level of an inventory item and see the updated value in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the link to the inventory view
Click the adjust stock button for the first active ingredient in the list
Enter a new valid stock level value in the adjustment input field
Save the adjustment
Verify a success notification is shown
Verify the updated stock level is displayed in the list

title: View sales reports KPIs on dashboard
description: This verifies that an authorized user can view the reports dashboard, showing KPI cards for daily/monthly sales, completed orders, and ticket averages.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the link to the reports view
Verify the reports dashboard page is displayed
Verify KPI cards for sales, completed orders, and ticket averages are visible with values

title: Filter sales reports by preset date ranges
description: This verifies that a user can filter the reports data using the date preset buttons like Hoy, and the data updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the link to the reports view
Click the filter button for Hoy range
Verify the reports update to show only sales data for the current day

title: Modify ticket configuration and tax percentage
description: This verifies that an authorized user can navigate to the settings ticket tab, modify the IVA percentage and footer message, and save the settings successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the link to the settings view
Click the Ticket/IVA tab button
Update the IVA percentage input field value
Update the ticket footer message input field value
Submit the ticket settings form
Verify a success notification is shown
